description: Native English (American). Male, early 60s. High quality, studio-clean. Persona: patient gatekeeper magnate. Emotion: composed, controlled, quietly assured. Level, low, and unhurried; a faint, placeless old-money East-Coast register sanded smooth by decades of public life. Measured full sentences, rarely contracted, holding the room by stillness rather than by volume.
text: [deliberate] You ask me whether it is fair. That is the wrong question... Fairness preserves nothing. Ask instead what is necessary. What is sustainable. [serious] A future is not owed to anyone. It is built, and then it is carried by those willing to make it irreversible.
